email_1_body:
Hey {first_name},

I was looking at dental practices in {city} and your {rating}-star rating across {review_count} reviews caught my eye. That kind of consistency doesn't happen by accident.

I work with dental practices to turn that reputation into a steady stream of new patients through targeted digital campaigns. One practice we work with in {state} added 47 new patients in 90 days.

Would you be open to a quick chat about what that could look like for {business_name}?

Best,
{sender_name}
email_2_body:
Hey {first_name},

Just wanted to circle back. I know you're busy running {business_name}.

The reason I reached out: practices with strong reviews like yours are sitting on a goldmine of social proof that most don't leverage in their marketing.

We helped a practice similar to yours in {state} go from 12 to 35 new patient calls per month. Happy to share the exact playbook.

Worth a 15-minute call this week?

{sender_name}
email_3_body:
Hey {first_name},

I've reached out a couple times and haven't heard back — totally understand if the timing isn't right.

I'll close out your file on my end unless you'd like to explore how other {industry} practices in {city} are filling their schedules.

Either way, wish you the best with {business_name}.

{sender_name}
